entity: James Harden 2018-19 season (HOU, Regular): 78 GP, 36.1 PPG, 6.6 RPG, 7.5 APG — the highest scoring average since Michael Jordan (1986-87) and the only 36+ PPG season in the modern era, 2018-19 scoring champion

query_target.sql: SELECT season_year, season_type, CAST(gp AS INTEGER) AS gp, avg_pts, avg_reb, avg_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 201935 AND season_year = '2018-19' AND season_type = 'Regular' LIMIT 1

notes: Retired player's historic season (Harden is still active, but this fixture pins a specific completed season); match:containsObject with exact values. team_abbreviation is omitted because agg_player_season.team_abbreviation is unreliable (shows 'SD' for Harden's HOU seasons). 36.1 PPG is the exact BBR-canonical average.
